posts.note: A growth-and-sales blend — heavier on business development than your digital niche; a glance only.
posts.coldEmail:

Hi there,

Warm regards,

posts.note: Third HR contact at AdMedia for the same Publisher Development Manager role — Amrita is the HR Executive; having three contacts is an advantage.
posts.dm: Hi Amrita — saw your post about the Publisher Development Manager role at AdMedia. I am a Dubai-based senior performance and paid-media marketer, 10+ yrs, with 12.5x ROAS across 8 GCC markets and strong programmatic experience. Worth a quick chat? — Aliaa
posts.coldEmail:
To: amrita.mandal@admedia.com
Subject: Performance marketer — re: your Publisher Development Manager role

Hi Amrita,

I came across your post hiring for the Publisher Development Manager role, and it lines up closely with my background in paid media and performance marketing.

A quick note on me — I am a Dubai-based digital, growth and CRM marketer with 10+ years at Majid Al Futtaim, L'Oreal and Samsung. Three results I am proud of:
•  12.5x ROAS on paid media across 8 GCC markets, cost-per-acquisition down 80%
•  A CRM rebuild on a Bloomreach CDP spanning 1.7M+ customer profiles
•  Email revenue up 40x — published by Braze as a global case study

If the role is still open I would welcome the chance to be considered, and would gladly share my CV (Aliaa_Mohamed_CV_ATS_Performance_Marketing.docx) and specific case studies. Would you be open to a short conversation?

Warm regards,
Aliaa Mohamed
